categories.name: (उन्नत शब्दावली बुद्धिमत्ता प्रणाली)
categories.intro:
Teacher Introduction
बच्चों, अब तक हमने:
grammar
tense
translation intelligence
spoken English
thinking system
समझ लिया।
अब हम सीखेंगे:
Advanced Vocabulary Intelligence
क्योंकि: English fluency केवल grammar से नहीं आती।
Real fluency आती है:
strong vocabulary
correct word choice
emotional nuance
natural collocation
expression depth
से।

categories.name: Main Goal of Part 33
categories.intro:
Student:
सही word चुन सके
similar words का difference समझ सके
emotional vocabulary समझ सके
natural collocation use कर सके
formal/informal vocabulary पहचान सके
expressive English बोल सके

categories.name: Included Systems
categories.intro:
1. Root Word System
2. Word Family System
3. Synonym Intelligence System
4. Antonym Intelligence System
5. Nuance Difference System
6. Emotional Vocabulary System
7. Formal vs Informal Vocabulary
8. Collocation System
9. Powerful Daily Vocabulary System
10. Vocabulary Usage Drill System

categories.name: 1. Root Word System
categories.intro: (मूल शब्द प्रणाली)

categories.name: What is Root Word?
categories.intro: एक ऐसा मूल शब्द जिससे कई नए शब्द बनते हैं।

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
Root: act
act
action
active
activity
actor
activate
reaction
interaction

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Root word समझने से: हजारों शब्द जल्दी समझ आते हैं।

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
Root: port
Meaning: carry करना

categories.name: transport
categories.intro:
import
export
portable
report

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
Root: dict
Meaning: speak

categories.name: dictionary
categories.intro:
predict
dictation
verdict

categories.name: 2. Word Family System
categories.intro: (शब्द परिवार प्रणाली)

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
beauty
beautiful
beautifully
beautify

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: एक word family: noun, adjective, adverb, verb सभी forms सिखाती है।

categories.name: Another Example
categories.intro:
success
successful
successfully
succeed

categories.name: Sentence Usage
categories.intro:
He succeeded in life.
He is successful.
He completed the work successfully.
Success needs discipline.

categories.name: 3. Synonym Intelligence System
categories.intro: (समानार्थी शब्द बुद्धिमत्ता प्रणाली)

categories.name: Big
categories.intro:
big
large
huge
enormous
gigantic

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: सबका meaning similar है, लेकिन intensity अलग है।

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
The house is big.
The building is enormous.

categories.name: Another Example
categories.intro:
happy
glad
cheerful
delighted
ecstatic

categories.name: Emotional Intensity Difference
categories.intro:
happy
→ normal happiness
ecstatic
→ extreme happiness

categories.name: 4. Antonym Intelligence System
categories.intro: (विलोम शब्द बुद्धिमत्ता प्रणाली)

categories.name: Examples
categories.intro:
happy ↔ sad
rich ↔ poor
strong ↔ weak
victory ↔ defeat
ancient ↔ modern

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Vocabulary: comparison से जल्दी याद होती है।

categories.name: 5. Nuance Difference System
categories.intro: (सूक्ष्म अर्थ अंतर प्रणाली)

categories.name: Important Concept
categories.intro: दो words similar हो सकते हैं, लेकिन feeling/context अलग हो सकता है।

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
angry
annoyed
upset
furious

categories.name: Difference
categories.intro:
annoyed
→ हल्की चिढ़
angry
→ सामान्य गुस्सा
furious
→ बहुत ज्यादा गुस्सा

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
look
see
watch

categories.name: see
categories.intro: अपने आप दिखाई देना

categories.name: look
categories.intro: जानबूझकर देखना

categories.name: watch
categories.intro: लगातार ध्यान से देखना

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
hear
listen

categories.name: hear
categories.intro: automatic hearing

categories.name: listen
categories.intro: attention-based hearing

categories.name: 6. Emotional Vocabulary System
categories.intro: (भावनात्मक शब्दावली प्रणाली)

categories.name: Fear Vocabulary
categories.intro:
afraid
scared
terrified
frightened
nervous

categories.name: Happiness Vocabulary
categories.intro:
happy
glad
excited
delighted
ecstatic

categories.name: Sadness Vocabulary
categories.intro:
sad
upset
depressed
heartbroken

categories.name: Confidence Vocabulary
categories.intro:
confident
bold
fearless
self-assured

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Emotion vocabulary: spoken English को powerful बनाती है।

categories.name: 7. Formal vs Informal Vocabulary
categories.intro: (औपचारिक एवं अनौपचारिक शब्दावली)

categories.name: InformalFormal
categories.intro:
askinquire
buypurchase
helpassist
startcommence
endterminate

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
Informal: Can you help me?
Formal: Could you assist me?

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: हर जगह same vocabulary use नहीं होती।

categories.name: 8. Collocation System
categories.intro: (प्राकृतिक शब्द संयोजन प्रणाली)

categories.name: What is Collocation?
categories.intro: ऐसे words जो naturally साथ उपयोग होते हैं।

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
make a mistake ✅
do a mistake ❌

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
take a decision ✅
eat a decision ❌

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
heavy rain ✅
strong rain ❌

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Vocabulary केवल meaning नहीं है, natural pairing भी है।

categories.name: More Collocations
categories.intro:
catch a bus
break a promise
make money
pay attention
do homework
take tea
have tea
drink water

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: यहीं से: natural English बनती है।

categories.name: 9. Powerful Daily Vocabulary System
categories.intro: (दैनिक शक्तिशाली शब्दावली प्रणाली)

categories.name: Daily Life Words
categories.intro:
improve
develop
achieve
focus
discipline
confidence
communication
knowledge
experience
opportunity

categories.name: Daily Usage
categories.intro:
I want to improve my English.
Discipline is important for success.
Practice develops confidence.

categories.name: Academic Vocabulary
categories.intro:
analyze
evaluate
compare
explain
demonstrate
conclude

categories.name: Professional Vocabulary
categories.intro:
meeting
project
deadline
presentation
strategy
management

categories.name: 10. Vocabulary Usage Drill System
categories.intro: (शब्दावली प्रयोग अभ्यास प्रणाली)

categories.name: Word Rotation
categories.intro:
happy
→ glad
→ cheerful
→ delighted

categories.name: Sentence Rotation
categories.intro:
I am happy.
I am glad to meet you.
She looks cheerful today.
He was delighted by the result.

categories.name: Angry Situation
categories.intro:
He is angry.
He is furious.
He completely lost his temper.

categories.name: Sad Situation
categories.intro:
I feel sad.
I feel upset.
I am heartbroken.

categories.name: Vocabulary Expansion Drill
categories.intro:
small
→ tiny
→ little
→ miniature
good
→ great
→ excellent
→ outstanding
bad
→ awful
→ terrible
→ horrible

categories.name: Final Vocabulary Intelligence Formula
categories.intro:
Vocabulary
+
Context
+
Nuance
+
Collocation
+
Emotion
+
Natural Usage
Advanced English Expression

categories.name: Final Goal of Part 33
categories.intro:
Student:
strong vocabulary develop कर सके
similar words का difference समझ सके
emotional vocabulary use कर सके
natural collocation पहचान सके
formal/informal vocabulary समझ सके
expressive English बोल सके
real fluency विकसित कर सके।
